title: Amend execution plan with issue log and lightweight verification
outOfScope: Runtime implementation of the wizard or verification engine
Production scripts, tests, Makefile, CI, and verification policy implementation beyond the bounded Markdown budget calibration
Historical archive and historical evidence changes
Execution of the implementation Work Items listed by the plan

sources.reason: Work Item boundary and verification contract.
Repository governance terminology and lifecycle boundaries.
Current Markdown complexity ceiling exceeded by the requested plan documents.

riskAssessment.reason: The Work Item changes only the execution plan and issue-recording instructions; it must not implement runtime behavior.

executionDecision.reason: User explicitly authorized serial execution of every Work Item with a full PR and closure lifecycle.

preReviewWarnings: Confirm that the issue-recording Work Item is first, lightweight verification remains before installation, and no implementation scope is introduced by this plan-only change.
rawUserRequest: 用户已授权按计划逐工单串行执行，每个工单完成 Contract、检查、PR、合并、ai-close-work-item 和分支清理后再进入下一个。请在安装改善计划前增加工单问题记录 Work Item，问题写入文档并在全计划完成后汇总问题清单供用户查看；轻量验证与软 Gate 优化也放在安装计划前。

declaredIntent.summary: Amend the execution plan ordering and final issue-document review contract.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Issue-recording Work Item precedes all implementation Work Items
scenarioCoverage.reason: The amended Work Item table and detailed sections establish the ordering.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Every Work Item retains one branch, one PR, merge, closure, and cleanup
scenarioCoverage.reason: The Mandatory Lifecycle section applies to every listed Work Item.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Final issue summary is a document review point and completion does not require needs_human_confirmation
scenarioCoverage.reason: The issue overview document is the post-plan user review artifact and explicitly removes the final-state requirement.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The execution plan lists interactive-wizard-work-item-issue-log as the first pre-installation Work Item.
The lightweight verification and soft-gate optimization Work Item remains before the installation Work Items.
The issue-log document defines structured per-Work-Item records and a final problem overview for user review.
The plan requires each later Work Item to append or reference issue records and states that completion does not require needs_human_confirmation.
Only the two plan documents, the bounded Markdown budget ceiling, and generated Work Item evidence are changed; no runtime implementation is included.
guidelines: Preserve one Work Item = one branch = one PR.
Do not rewrite historical Archive or Evidence.
Do not implement future Work Items in this plan-amendment Work Item; the only policy change is the bounded Markdown budget calibration required by the added documents.

intent.problem: The existing execution plan does not make issue recording the first prerequisite Work Item, and its completion wording still requires a final needs_human_confirmation state even though the user wants to review a written issue document instead.
constraints: Keep the original installation plan scope and one-Work-Item/one-branch/one-PR lifecycle.
Place lightweight verification and soft-gate optimization before installation implementation.
Record issues in a document during execution and summarize them after all Work Items finish.
Do not modify historical evidence or implement runtime behavior in this Work Item.
intent.rationale: A dedicated plan amendment makes the new ordering and issue-review contract explicit before implementation begins, while preserving independent PR boundaries for every later Work Item.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized the full serial Work Item workflow and this plan amendment writes the governed plan documents.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.

budgetImpact.reason: The issue-log document and amended execution plan measure 9826 Markdown lines; reserve a bounded 9900 ceiling without creating a new repayment record.
